original: He watches you, looking more sad than anything. Then shakes his head.
"Ha, yes. So it could be." He doesn't sound convinced, but carries on. "Betrayal in another form, perhaps?"
His eyes go wide, and his arm grabs at the side of his desk, pulling him to a more formal sitting position.
"What do you know of Ulmus Pond?" he asks fiercely.
"What do you know of Ulmus Pond?" he asks fiercely.
A long pause. "Have you heard from Ulmus?" he asks. "Ulmus Pond. You recall him, surely."

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondB:"He's dead. On Chalcedon. A Pather called Sedge shot him."
original: He's dead. On Chalcedon. A Pather called Sedge shot him.

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondC:"I caught him. He promised to confess everything to you."
original: I caught him. He promised to confess everything to you.

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondD:"I caught him on Chalcedon. He sold you a fake relic. The Knights hold him now."
